instruction: In Terminal, check what the tmux session "tmux-shared-read-a1" is doing right now, and save the result as JSON to "$HOME/Desktop/tmux_result_1_1.json". Set "session" to "tmux-shared-read-a1" and set "latest_output" to the latest output from that tmux session.

command: tmux new-session -d -s "tmux-shared-read-a1" "printf '%s\\n' 'build queue: idle' 'last task: invoices refresh' 'TMUX_SHARED_MARKER_1A'; tail -f /dev/null"

reference_command:
python3 - <<'PY' > "$HOME/Desktop/tmux_result_1_1.json"
import json
import subprocess
out = subprocess.check_output(['tmux', 'capture-pane', '-t', 'tmux-shared-read-a1', '-p'], text=True)
lines = [line for line in out.splitlines() if line.strip()]
latest_output = '\n'.join(lines[-20:])
print(json.dumps({'session': 'tmux-shared-read-a1', 'latest_output': latest_output}))
PY
